name: Fundamental Theorem of System Homomorphisms
description: Characterization of homomorphic images via the HIMSY construction.

elements.text: Z1 = HIMSY(Z2, HS, HI, HO) if and only if {Z1, Z2} ⊆ DSYSTEMS and Z1 is a homomorphic image of Z2 with respect to HS, HI, and HO.
If Z1 = HIMSY(Z2, HS, HI, HO), then Z1 is a homomorphic image of Z2.
If Z1 is a homomorphic image of Z2 with respect to HS, HI, HO, then Z1 = HIMSY(Z2, HS, HI, HO).
